top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Bill Ackman’s Pershing Exits €1.4 Billion Universal Music Stake
top_signals.summary: Bill Ackman sold his €1.42 billion ($1.65 billion) stake in Universal Music Group NV just days after the Amsterdam-listed company rejected a takeover bid by the hedge fund billionaire.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Apollo Set to Hand Over Control of Reno de Medici to Bondholders
top_signals.summary: Apollo Global Management is set to hand over the keys of Reno de Medici SpA to its bondholders, as part of a debt restructuring, according to people familiar with the matter.
